name: KittyMatch
description: Welcome to the fluffiest cleanup mission ever! Tap the stacked items to pick them up and drop them into your slots. When three identical items gather together—poof!—they merge into a satisfying match and disappear (as if your kitty just approved it). Keep matching smartly to clear the pile, and once all items are gone, you’ve completed the level! But hey—this isn’t just tidying up. Keep your eyes sharp: there are hidden Easter eggs tucked between the stacks, and plenty of adorable cat skins waiting to be unlocked. Match, clear, and collect—because every great kitty deserves a cute new look!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
